documentation.description: The IMU readings in SI units in NED body frame

record_types.name: Highres_Imu

fields.name: Time_Usec
fields.description:
Units: [us]
Timestamp (UNIX Epoch time or time since system boot). The receiving
end can infer timestamp format (since 1.1.1970 or since system boot)
by checking for the magnitude of the number.

fields.name: Xgyro
fields.description:
Units: [rad/s]
Angular speed around X axis

fields.name: Ygyro
fields.description:
Units: [rad/s]
Angular speed around Y axis

fields.name: Zgyro
fields.description:
Units: [rad/s]
Angular speed around Z axis

fields.name: Fields_Updated
fields.description: Bitmap for fields that have updated since last message

fields.name: Id
fields.description:
Id. Ids are numbered from 0 and map to IMUs numbered from 1 (e.g.
IMU1 will have a message with id=0)
